title: Plain Cars Pack
description: A FVTM Pack with some plain cars/vehicles!
body:
**1.12.2 -> Forge**    
**1.20.1 -> Forge**    
**26.1.+ -> Fabric**    

A simple FVTM pack containing a few simple ready-to-use vehicles,
each with multiple color channels (exterior, interior, seats).

Among them currently:
- a few simple Cars
- a simple Truck/Lorry
- a simple Autobus  

_All models and assets in this project are made made by FEX__96 (me), a tool called FMT was used to generate some of the json/icons._

Video on how to change color: [YouTube](https://youtu.be/VUQuMcoTXHc?si=0TjB_Y5wMxAxf4bb&t=142) / [bilibili](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1Vs421T7wz/?share_source=copy_web&vd_source=f8ab1221e96d6d2aac9f7dae39e8d3bf&t=141) (start at 2:22)

Dependencies:
- FCL - Fexcraft Common Library
- FVTM - Fex's Vehicle & Transportation Mod
- GEP - General Essentials Pack
